Maître François

Single Miniature Excised from Boccaccio's Des Cleres et nobles femmes: Queen Medusa and Her Court
by Maître François
France, 15th century · c. 1470 · tempera and gold on vellum
The Last Judgment from Les Sept Articles de la Foi by Jean Chappuis
by Maître François
France · medieval · 1465–1475 · Manuscript cutting in tempera and gold leaf
